disagreement_summary: The three-judge council produced materially different risk judgments across the technical, governance, and operational lenses. All three judges split across different risk tiers, indicating a materially contested assessment. The council differs materially on severity by 89 risk-score points.
rationale: The final synthesis blends all three validated judge scores with the council critique/arbitration round. The critique reconciled the council at 49/100 (High), while the confidence-weighted blended council score is 39/100 (Medium). The score-only synthesis lands at Medium, but the final tier is held at Critical because at least one judge assigned the higher tier. The critique round uses a confidence-weighted reconciliation across all participating judges rather than a fixed Judge 1 vs Judge 2 comparison. Because score spread is material, the reconciled score is biased upward toward the highest-risk judgment to avoid understating unresolved concerns.
next_actions: Escalate the case to a human governance board for adjudication of the highest-risk concerns.
Do not approve deployment until the combined technical, governance, and operational issues are resolved.
Schedule an adjudication review to resolve the remaining cross-judge disagreements before production use.
